questions.question:
Gateway API resources in namespace `gateway-lab` are inconsistent.

A broken `Gateway` named `main-gateway`, a broken `HTTPRoute` named `app-routes`, and backend workloads already exist. Repair the Gateway API configuration so that:
- a `GatewayClass` named `cka-014-gc` exists with controller name `example.com/gateway-controller`
- `Gateway` `main-gateway` uses GatewayClass `cka-014-gc`
- the Gateway listens on HTTP port `80`
- `HTTPRoute` `app-routes` attaches to `main-gateway`
- host `apps.example.local` routes `/app1` to service `app1-svc` port `8080`
- host `apps.example.local` routes `/app2` to service `app2-svc` port `8080`
- any stale `/legacy` route is removed
- save the repaired HTTPRoute manifest to `/tmp/exam/q1/app-routes.yaml`

Do not recreate the backend Deployments or Services unless it is strictly required.

verification.description: GatewayClass and Gateway use the intended listener and class contract
HTTPRoute attaches to the Gateway and routes /app1 and /app2 to the intended backends
Backend services remain ready and the repaired HTTPRoute manifest is exported
